Improved Event Content for the `TkAlHLT*` ALCARECO
Change fromVertex parameter from False to True for DGL reconstruction
Increase Nano relval WF counter buffer size
MTD DetId: add static methods to MTDDetId to test whether it is BTL or ETL
Fix for `n_layers` Check in `CAHitNtupletAlpaka::globalBeginRun`
MTD Validation: update vertex multiplicity plots
`ScoutingCollectionMonitor` add muon "Vtx" collections
Change of HF threshold of OO era
Update getCudaCoresPerSM for Blackwell GPUs
adds Heavy Ion initialization to Pythia
[NGT] Fix filling of ValueMap for DeepJet scores for NanoAOD Phase2 HLT
remove warnings about `UnusedProductsForCanDeleteEarly` in the phase-2 HLT menu
[TrackingTools/KalmanUpdators] Add using declaration to prevent funct
Fixed G4LorentzVector usage, momentum updating, and energy deposit model in FullModelHadronicProcess.cc
Add switch for scalar sum to LHEPtFilter
Remove deprecated genParticleCandidates
Phase2-hgx364S Modify some parameters for the no cell option for the V19 scenario
LST notebooks for neural network training: make training reproducible
Extend NanoAOD for NGT Phase 2 Scouting with Tau and Gen information
New HLT Scouting DQM Online Client
Introduce a stub of `LHCInfoPer*` Payload Inspector
[HGCAL] Update HGCal unpacker to handle flexible fedId assignment
Avoid FSC Channels when Making HCAL LUT XML Payloads
fix the loop range in mkFit MkFinder hit checks
apply `stage2` L1T customizations to `TrackToTrackComparisonHists`
A More Flexible And Lightweight CA
Update HLT MultiTrackValidator
Update for BPHNano to solve issues with different compilers
Updated to use __getitem__
Add protection to skip addition FSC channels.
[L1T] L1 Scouting multi-BX Online Selection based on BMTF stubs
silence `SiPixelRawToCluster` verbose ROC and FED error printouts
Phase2-hgx364T Correct the cell-less scenario for the V19 version of HGCal geometry
Run3-alca255 Make changes to carry out calibration by skipping some of the runs which are used for other tests
fix HLT TICL reconstruction sequences when `ticl_barrel` is invoked in presence of the `alpaka` modifier
TICL-barrel: run CLUE in the barrel calorimeters and first workflows
[Phase-2 L1T] fixing out of bound indices in Phase2L1CaloPFClusterEmulator
HLT Phase2 Alpaka menu in `relval_gpu`
[SIM] Clean up custom physics sub-library
add DQM plots for new CMS-FSC detector
